title: Junior Business Development Manager at Nexus Malls

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Nexus Malls
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
